title: 7pc Spatula Wax Carver Ceramic Pottery Double Ended Tool Set
description:
Precision work is made easy with the 4pc Spatula Wax Carver Set! The 4pc Spatual Wax Carver Set is a great addition to any hobby or craft tool collection. This set comes with 4 double-ended tools, constructed in India of stainless steel. At just 6.25" in length, these tools are the perfect size for precision work on tiny objects. This set comes with a durable PVC pouch for protection and easy storage while not in use. Each tool features a grip so you'll be able to hold on to it with ease. Make sure to grab this set before your next craft or hobby precision project!
